item.title: First responders are the best people on earth‚Ä¶ thank you for w...
item.description:
View on Instagram


First responders are the best people on earth‚Ä¶ thank you for what you do. it‚Äôs been an honour meeting you guys. üö® #lastrong If you have a following: Do fucking better, influence people for the better. It‚Äôs not just about you.. it‚Äôs bigger than you. #california #californialove #firstresponders #palisade #malibu #firefighter #firefighters #lawenforcement #lafires #californiafires #influncer #giveback #dobetter #burgers

item.title: I‚Äôm incredibly grateful for being able to do what I do, and wo...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I‚Äôm incredibly grateful for being able to do what I do, and wouldn‚Äôt possible without you guys watching my videos, I‚Äôm even more grateful for every first responder and person working tirelessly to fight these fires. üö®üëÆüèº‚Äç‚ôÇÔ∏èüßëüèº‚ÄçüöíIt‚Äôs not just about handing out burgers or a meal, but about showing up and putting a fucking smile on these heroes‚Äô faces, even if it‚Äôs just for a minute. They‚Äôre giving everything to protect our community. TO OTHER CONTENT CREATORS AND PEOPLE WITH A FOLLOWING: if you aren‚Äôt posting about what‚Äôs going on in your communities, and only pushing your content or products.. you should be fucking embarrassed. Step up‚Ä¶. Don‚Äôt just sit back and post about meaningless shit. #california #californiafires #palisades #malibu #wildfires #firstresponders #firefighter #firefighters #losangeles #lafires

item.title: To all the first responders fighting these fires‚Äîsome of you h...
item.description:
View on Instagram


To all the first responders fighting these fires‚Äîsome of you haven‚Äôt fucking slept in days, yet you still show up, exhausted, relentless and working around the clock.You‚Äôre not out here for the ‚Äúthanks‚Äù but you fucking deserve it. Thank you for all that you do. First responders are some of the most selfless people I‚Äôve met in my fucking life.üëÆüèº‚Äç‚ôÇÔ∏èüßëüèº‚Äçüöíüö® To anyone that has a platform, a voice, a following: Stop posting only about yourself. If you‚Äôve got a platform, use it to actually help. Fuck the vanity‚Äîdo better, raise awareness, and show up for something bigger than you. This is all bigger than social media, build a better community, build something special. Whatever you see on social media about these fires, it‚Äôs worse in person. I‚Äôm not saying that to be pessimistic, it‚Äôs just the reality. If you can help, there‚Äôs a link in my bio. If you can‚Äôt help, that‚Äôs okay. But if you can, do it. #california #californiafires #firefighters #firefighter #firstresponders #malibu #eatoncanyon #altadena #palisades #losangeles #wildfires #sunsetblvd #hollywood

item.title: This video isn‚Äôt really about food, and I‚Äôm not here to dive...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This video isn‚Äôt really about food, and I‚Äôm not here to dive into the politics of how the governor has ‚Äúfucked it up.‚Äù Instead, I want to highlight the incredible first responders. üö® Last night, I had the honor of speaking to hundreds of them. Every single one of them has been working for days without sleep. You could see the exhaustion on their faces‚Äîcovered in smoke and ashes, with tears in their eyes. What‚Äôs happening in California right now is absolutely devastating. Families are losing their homes, the places they‚Äôve built their lives, shared memories and dreamed of their futures..You don‚Äôt have to be an influencer or a celebrity to make a difference. If you‚Äôd like to help, you can check the link in my bio. There are endless ways you can help. To every first responder out there: thank you. Keep doing what you do. California has your back. The world has your back. Your courage and sacrifice mean everything. ‚ô•Ô∏èüöíüëÆüèº‚Äç‚ôÇÔ∏è #californiafires #firstresponders #palisades #pacificpalisades #losangeles #californiafires #california #lafd
